suites.title: Lay Owner Dashboard User Journey & Feature Suite (/dashboard.html)

specs.title: TC-DASH-01: Plant status pulse strip shows availability and core KPIs
TC-DASH-02: Reliability card surfaces MTBF, MTTR, and repeat-breakdown signal
TC-DASH-03: Financial impact card shows downtime and maintenance cost
TC-DASH-04: Operational efficiency KPI cards render with benchmark hints
TC-DASH-05: Cost management KPI cards render with RAV and emergency-cost ratios
TC-DASH-06: Priority Queue Inspection & Drilldown Scroll
TC-DASH-07: Strategic planning section renders the shift handover panel
